title: Help shape Europe’s Circular Economy Act: Join the final stakeholder workshop
content: Discover how Europe can strengthen its access to secondary raw materials and accelerate the transition to a competitive circular economy.
snippet: Discover how Europe can strengthen its access to secondary raw materials and accelerate the transition to a competitive circular economy.

title: Workshop on fair climate policies highlights carbon pricing and solutions
content: The second Research for Just Transition Policy workshop focused on how climate and energy policies, including carbon pricing, affect households and ways to ensure a fair transition.
snippet: The second Research for Just Transition Policy workshop focused on how climate and energy policies, including carbon pricing, affect households and ways to ensure a fair transition.

title: Publication of the AZEA Roadmap
content: On Monday 20 April, the Alliance for Zero-Emission Aviation (AZEA) held its Roadmap Publication Ceremony at EUROCONTROL, in the context of the 7th General Assembly of the Alliance.
snippet: On Monday 20 April, the Alliance for Zero-Emission Aviation (AZEA) held its Roadmap Publication Ceremony at EUROCONTROL, in the context of the 7th General Assembly of the Alliance.

title: Commission proposes full resumption of EU-Syria Cooperation Agreement
content: The European Commission has proposed the full resumption of the EU-Syria Cooperation Agreement, marking a new step in relations between both sides.

title: EU action plan for gender equality and women’s empowerment in EU external action (GAP IV)

title: EU presents first Action Plan under the Pact for the Mediterranean

title: Commissioner Jørgensen in Spain to discuss ways to tackle the energy and housing crises
content: On Monday and Tuesday, 20-21 April, Commissioner for Energy and Housing Dan Jørgensen will be in Madrid and Barcelona to discuss energy security, affordability and ways to tackle the housing crisis with Spanish national and local authorities, as well as sectorial stakeholders and young people.

title: Commission advances cloud sovereignty through strategic procurement
content: This April, the European Commission awarded its Sovereign Cloud call for tender through which the EU institutions, bodies, offices and agencies (Union entities) will be able to procure sovereign cloud services for up to EUR 180 million over a period of 6 years.

title: EAfA Member Spotlight: Workplus connects employers with talent through apprenticeships

title: Commission approves Bulgarian, German and Slovenian State aid schemes providing temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies

title: Over 10 million workers trained under the Pact for Skills
content: The annual survey on the Pact for Skills reveals that over 10 million people, including 3.9 million in 2025 alone, have benefited from upskilling initiatives since 2020.
snippet: The annual survey on the Pact for Skills reveals that over 10 million people, including 3.9 million in 2025 alone, have benefited from upskilling initiatives since 2020.

title: Zeefier: Creating natural dyes from local seaweed
content: Founded in the Netherlands, Zeefier is an innovative company developing textile dyes made from seaweed. By replacing petrol‑based chemistry with a renewable ocean resource, Zeefier offers an alternative that enables textiles to remain biodegradable.

title: Commission approves €411 million Croatian capital injection into development bank HBOR
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €411 million capital injection by Croatia's government into the national development bank Hrvatska Banka za Obnovu i Razvitak ('HBOR').

title: New EMN inform examines safe countries of origin and safe third countries under the new Asylum Procedure Regulation

title: Emergency funding to shield fisheries and aquaculture from Middle East crisis
content: The European Commission has activated the crisis mechanism of the European Maritime, Fisheries and Aquaculture Fund (EMFAF).

title: Founding treaty of EU’s predecessor turns 75
content: On April 18 we celebrate 75 years since the signing of the Treaty of Paris establishing the European Coal and Steel Community (ECSC), the first Treaty that led to the creation of the European Union.

title: BlueInvest Africa 2026: Meet the 25 African startups pitching to global investors
